chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4944 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. 29.01.2026. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the record reflects that this Petition has been pending since 13.08.2025 with no one having come forward to address the Office Objection or appear today albeit the matter having been fixed in Court for orders as to non-prosecution, all of which suggest that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
